name: Outlook Security Settings Changed in Registry
notes:
This rule detects changing in Outlook email security settings.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Change Outlook Security Setting in Registry
SIGMA Description: Change outlook email security settings


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
when the event matches Registry Key (custom) contains any of [\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Office or \Outlook\Security]
TD_list: APPLY Outlook Security Settings Changed in Registry on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
AND when the event matches Registry Key (custom) contains any of [\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Office or \Outlook\Security]
RED_list: Event name: Outlook Security Settings Changed in Registry
Event description: Detects changing in Outlook email security settings.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
